name: Arvonian Base
long_desc: Duchess Class Mixed-Use Space Station. Depending on configuration, it can support both civilian and military power. In either case, it can house up to several wings of defence fighters and has a single modest defensive beam turret.

name: Skaraan Base
long_desc: Standard Model Skarran Military Post. This modular design is mass-produced with several configurations for widely separate uses. Designed for use by various Skarran war mercenary groups. The base model is unremarkable, but it has an extensive module bay that may hold additional abilities depending on the owner's purse.

name: Torgoth Base
long_desc: Chieftain Class Torgoth Base. As per Torgoth doctrine, it has some of the heaviest shields known and an armored hull to boot. It has a relatively wimpy single beam, however, but comes equipped with a drone launcher.

name: Kralien Base
long_desc: Collection Class Space Station. This mass-produced design is made for cheap manufacture and even quicker assembly on site. This station can be found throughout Hegemony space as a cost-effective station for all but the most specialist requirements.

name: Light Cruiser
long_desc: TSN Light Cruiser^Standard long patrol vessel of the TSN.^2 forward beams^2 Torpedo tubes^Stores for 2 nukes, 8 homing, 6 mines, 4 EMP, 2 PShock.

name: Shuttle
long_desc: TSN Shuttle^Standard shuttle of the TSN.^1 forward beam.

name: Fighter
long_desc: TSN Fighter^Standard fighter of the TSN.^1 forward beam.  5 torpedoes.

name: Bomber
long_desc: TSN Bomber^Standard bomber of the TSN.^1 forward beam.  10 torpedoes.

name: Battle Cruiser
long_desc: TSN Battle Cruiser^Heavy weapon vessel of the TSN.^4 forward beams^2 Torpedo tubes^Stores for 3 nukes, 10 homing, 6 mines, 6 EMP, 5 PShock.

name: Carrier
long_desc: TSN Carrier^Fighter and bomber carrier of the TSN.^2 forward beams^2 Torpedo tubes^8 fighters^Stores for 1 nuke, 16 homing, 2 mines, 4 EMP, 5 PShock.

name: Light Carrier
long_desc: TSN Light Carrier^Six fighters and 2 forward beams

name: BattleShip
long_desc: TSN Battleship^Heavy weapon vessel of the TSN.^4 forward beams^2 Torpedo tubes^Stores for 3 nukes, 10 homing, 6 mines, 6 EMP, 5 PShock.

name: Mine Layer
long_desc: TSN Mine Layer^Specialized strategic vessel of the TSN.^1 forward beam^4 Torpedo tubes^Stores for 10 homing and 25 mines.

name: Warpster
long_desc: TSN Warpster^Light utility vessel of the TSN.^1 short-range rapid beam^1 Torpedo tubes^Stores for 6 homing and 2 EMP.

name: Juggernaut
long_desc: TSN Juggernaut^Ultra-heavy warship of the TSN.^4 forward beams^6 fighters^4 Torpedo tubes^Stores for 16 homing, 7 nukes, 7 EMP, 10 mines.

name: Missile Cruiser
long_desc: TSN Missile Cruiser^Specialized fleet support vessel of the TSN.^4 Torpedo tubes^1 defensive beam^Stores for 8 nukes, 20 homing, 14 mines, 12 EMP.

name: Destroyer
long_desc: TSN Destroyer^Standard local patrol vessel of the TSN.^2 forward beams^

name: Dreadnought
long_desc: TSN Dreadnought^Heavy war vessel of the TSN.^3 primary beams^1 main beam cannon^3 Torpedo tubes^Stores for 4 nukes, 10 homing, 8 mines, 5 EMP, 4 PShock.

name: Escort
long_desc: TSN Escort^Standard escort vessel of the TSN.^2 forward beams

name: Heavy Cruiser
long_desc: TSN Heavy Cruiser^Standard medium range patrol vessel of the TSN.^3 forward beams^2 Torpedo tubes^Stores for 3 nukes, 10 homing, 8 mines, 6 EMP, 4 PShock.

name: Scout
long_desc: TSN Scout^Standard long range fleet scout of the TSN.^1 forward beam^1 Torpedo tube^Stores for 6 homing, 2 mines, 2 EMP, 1 PShock.

name: Barbarian
long_desc: Displacement: 50 kt. Armament: 3 medium beams, 1 drone launcher.

name: Goliath
long_desc: Displacement: 80 kt. Armament: 6 medium beams, 1 drone launcher.

name: Leviathan
long_desc: Displacement: 90 kt. Armament: 4 medium beams, 1 heavy beam, 1 drone launcher.

name: Behemoth
long_desc: Displacement: 150 kt. Armament: 10 standard beams, 1 drone launcher

name: Fighter
long_desc: Displacement: 0.015 kt. Armament: 2 light beams.

name: Destroyer
long_desc: The basic escort ship of the Arvonian fleet.  Displacement: 20 kt. Armament: 4 standard beams.

name: Light Carrier
long_desc: Displacement: 25 kt. Armament: 4 medium beams. Complement: 8 fighters.

name: Carrier
long_desc: Displacement: 45 kt. Armament: 6 long-range beams. Complement: 12 fighters.

name: Transport
long_desc: An unarmed colony transport, filled with homesteading cargo and civilian colonists. Displacement: 80 kt.

name: Luxury Liner
long_desc: An unarmed luxury ship, filled with wealthy civilians in fancy clothes. Displacement: 65 kt.

name: Cargo
long_desc: An unarmed bulk freighter, slowly moving cheap cargo between the stars. Displacement: 75 kt.

name: Science
long_desc: A peaceful ship of Science, unlocking the secrets among the stars.

name: Biomech A
long_desc: A biomech.

name: Biomech B
long_desc: A biomech.

name: Biomech C
long_desc: A biomech.

name: Biomech D
long_desc: A biomech.

name: Defiler
long_desc: Displacement: 40 kt. Armament: 2 medium beams. The Skaraan's lightest ship of commerce and war.

name: Executor
long_desc: Displacement: 70 kt. Armament: 2 super-heavy beams, 1 medium beam. Very dangerous.

name: Enforcer
long_desc: Displacement: 50 kt. Armament: 4 standard beams. Medium Skaraan ship of commerce and war.

name: Cruiser
long_desc: Displacement: 9 kt. Armament: 2 x standard beams. The most common warship in the known universe.

name: Battleship
long_desc: Displacement: 17 kt. Armament: 2 x rapid-fire beams. Heart of the Kralien fleet.

name: Dreadnought
long_desc: Displacement: 25 kt.  Armament: 2 rapid-fire beams, 1 heavy beam. The most dangerous Kralien ship.

name: Freebooter
long_desc: Fighter of the pirate fleet.

name: Longbow
long_desc: Scout class vessel^1 forward beams^1 Torpedo tube^Stores for 8 homing, 2 EMP, 1 Mine, 1 PShock.^Most common of the pirate fleet.

name: Strongbow
long_desc: Cruiser of the pirate fleet.^Pirate raider.^4 forward beams^2 Torpedo tubes^Stores for 12 homing, 12 EMP, 2 Mines,  8 PShock.

name: Brigantine
long_desc: Pirate corvette and light carrier.^2 forward beams, 1 rear beam^2 Torpedo tubes^Stores for 12 homing, 4 Mines, 12 EMP, 8 PShock.

name: Avenger
long_desc: Ximni single-seat fighter.

name: Battleship
long_desc: Ximni Battleship^Beam-heavy combat vessel of the Ximni.^4 forward beams^2 Torpedo tubes^Stores for 8 homing, 2 nukes, 4 EMP, 6 mines, 5 PShock.

name: Corsair
long_desc: Light utility ship of the Ximni fleet.^2 forward beams^2 Torpedo tubes^Stores for 8 homing, 2 nukes, 2 EMP, 3 mines, 5 PShock.

name: Destroyer
long_desc: Standard local patrol ship of the Ximni fleet. Two forward beams.

name: Carrier
long_desc: Standard carrier of the Ximni fleet. Eight fighters. Two forward beams, 1 Torpedo tube. Stores for 6 homing, 1 nuke, 2 EMP, 4 mines, 2 PShock.

name: Light Carrier
long_desc: Light carrier of the Ximni fleet. Two forward beams, six fighters

name: Dreadnought
long_desc: Ximni Dreadnought^Heaviest wartime vessel of the Ximni.^4 primary beams, long-range and fast-firing^3 Torpedo tubes^Stores for 10 homing, 4 nukes, 5 EMP, 8 mines, 4 PShock.

name: Escort
long_desc: Standard escort vessel of the Ximni fleet. Two forward beams.

name: Corvette
long_desc: Light utility vessel of the Ximni fleet. One forward beam, one torpedo tube. Stores 6 homing and 2 EMP.

name: Light Cruiser
long_desc: Standard long-range patrol ship of the Ximni fleet. ^3 beams^2 Torpedo tubes^Stores for 8 homing, 2 nukes, 4 EMP, 6 mines, 2 PShock.

name: Missile Cruiser
long_desc: Specialized Ximni fleet fire-support ship. ^4 Torpedo tubes, 1 rear beam^Stores for 20 homing, 8 nukes, 12 EMP, 14 mines, 6 PShock.

name: Scout
long_desc: Ximni Scout^Long-range scout vessel of the Ximni.^1 forward beam^1 Torpedo tube^Stores for 6 homing, 2 EMP, 2 mines, 1 PShock.

name: Jump Node
long_desc: Oliver Class Jump Tether. This unit tethers and provides critical sensor and nav data to ships wanting to transition the linked naturally forming jump node. Most civilian ships can't travel intersolar without a properly functioning node.

name: Deep Space Station
long_desc: The Deep Solitude DS Station is designed to exist on the frontiers of USFP space with little to no support. Strong shields, a large cargo bay, and other defences mean it can hold its own. It has a decent science wing and good amenities.

name: LR Beam Platform
long_desc: The Vorkosican Class Beam Platform offers a stable power supply for some of the longest-range beams the USFP knows how to construct. Often found at sites of particular importance to the USFP, its design was stolen a number of years ago.

name: Torpedo Platform
long_desc: Defensive torpedo battery. Has a large supply of standardised torpedoes. Not especially threatening to a military ship, but very persistent and has a wide area of influence.

name: Fighter Platform
long_desc: The Allard Industries Fighter Platform is a high-tech mini station designed exclusively as a defensive or patrol point base for light in-system shuttles and combat craft. Often used by the USFP Customs Agency at borders to house inspection craft or at military facilities to provide a greater patrol and defence installation than torpedo or beam batteries.

name: Industrial Unit
long_desc: Unity Class Industrial Unit. This is basically a large box where all sorts of additive and reductive processing occurs to produce components or finished items. Typically has a large wing for design.

name: Storage Module
long_desc: This is a storage area for nearby stations and industrial facilities. Rarely has anything more than a basic docking system and is typically private.

name: Refinary Unit
long_desc: This large unit is designed to break down raw asteroids into useful materials; half of the USFP is built from outputs of units like this.

name: Processor Unit
long_desc: The Theros Type Industrial Processor, useful for creating many types of components out of refined bar stock, or simply the industrial-scale manufacturing of simple items.

name: Assembly Yard
long_desc: This is a Bidilin Class modular Industrial Assembly Unit. It specialises in final assembly of goods from components, from home appliances to lab equipment to even small spacecraft. This unit can be configured for a wide range of applications.

name: Ship Yard
long_desc: ARC-class shipyard — Auxiliary Refit and Construction — A modular support platform designed for the assembly, repair, and modernization of military and commercial spacecraft. The class features expandable drydock frames, heavy fabrication gantries, stores modules, and reactor service booms.

name: Pirate Base
long_desc: Built into an asteroid, this base has a lot of the features of a normal commercial space station, without the safety regs. It appears to have a small fighter bay and a modular mount for other defences.

name: Cache
long_desc: This is a small storage location often used for storing loot and supplies. Has minimal life support capacity and limited defences.

name: Generator
long_desc: A high-powered generator. This unit can be modified in a number of ways for various purposes, all of them requiring high amounts of energy. It can remotely beam power to nearby ships or structures, or in some instances be used by onboard equipment.

name: Platform
long_desc: Arvonian Fighter Platform. Contains maintenance, barracks, and command facilities for a large wing of small fighters or bombers. This variant is optimised for Arvonian use.

name: Gas Extractor
long_desc: This Industrial Facility is Torgoth in origin; however, it has been co-opted by the Hegemony factions at large. It is designed to extract materials from nebulae for use in many industrial processes.

name: Dry Dock
long_desc: A Hegemony-designed docking facility for the construction, overhaul, and repair of Hegemony spaceships.

name: Light Craft Base
long_desc: The Hive Class Light Craft Platform is of Arvonian origin; however, it has been deployed throughout Hegemony space wherever a volume of space needs to be defended or patrolled.

name: Beam Defense
long_desc: Kralien in manufacture, this is a standardised beam defence platform that can be found in all territories of the Hegemony. 5 x 1.2G beams are its typical loadout, but it is designed with some upgradability in mind.

name: Hegemony Accumulator
long_desc: This device is designed to accumulate huge amounts of power and store it for use with a slingshot array or other super-high-energy device. Whilst the device normally dissipates energy safely on destruction, under some circumstances it can detonate with the force of many anti-ship nukes.

name: Slingshot Platform
long_desc: The Slingshot Platform design was stolen from the USFP during the Long Bar Conflict. It is an old FTL method that literally flings fleets across several sectors. It can fire multiple times an hour depending on the energy available. After use for between 30 minutes and 3 hours, it requires extensive downtime. Inherently inaccurate, even when the destination has a set-up antenna.

name: Slingshot Antenna
long_desc: This is a target antenna for a slingshot array. It is designed to pull ships that are travelling via slingshot towards it, inducing the field to collapse nearby, 0-100K, as opposed to somewhere inside about 20 AU.

name: Command
long_desc: Arvonian Command and Control vessel^

name: Arvonian Fighter mk2
long_desc: Displacement: 0.015 kt. Armament: 1 light beam and 1 drone or torpedo launcher.

name: Command
long_desc: Torgoth Command and Control vessel^

name: Drone Cruiser
long_desc: Kralien Drone Cruiser. Slightly modernized cruiser with an early drone launcher design purchased from the Torgoths and manufactured under license.

name: Transport
long_desc: Hegemony Armored Transport. This design is used extensively both militarily and in civilian use. It is both armed and armored to deal with pirates and raids.

name: Arrow
long_desc: Arrow Class Scout Cruiser. Fast but typically easy to outmanoeuvre, it is used for scouting and interception duties.

name: Axe
long_desc: Axe Class Cruiser. The Axe is a more general combatant. It is moderately tough to kill, but has a unique multi-barrelled beam array that is capable of firing very rapidly. This is significantly weaker against shields, but devastating against armor and hull.

name: Transport
long_desc: An unarmed colony transport, typically filled with cargo and civilians. Displacement: 80 kt.

name: Patrol Boat
long_desc: Sword Class Patrol Boat. Used by system defence forces and various licensed security forces.

name: Hjorden Cruiser
long_desc: Hjorden Cruiser. The Hjorden's only known class of military ship, modest in all respects save that it can be fitted with a number of special modules such as cloaking, Jump Drive, or Anti-Mine technology.

name: Lion Class Supply Ship
long_desc: Lion Class Supply Ship. An armed replenishment and transport ship for the TSN.

name: Nemesis Class Interceptor
long_desc: Nemesis Class Interceptor

name: Scout F
long_desc: Raider/Scout ship of the USN

name: Scout G
long_desc: Raider/Scout ship of the USN

name: Light Cruiser
long_desc: Medium Raider of the USN

name: Cruiser
long_desc: Fleet Vessel of the USN

name: Dreadnaught
long_desc: Heavy Fleet Vessel of the USN

name: Super Destroyer
long_desc: Capital ship of the USN

name: Primary
long_desc: A single Caltron unit. Relatively weak, not sentient in its own right; more of an automated fighter/scout.

name: Tertiary
long_desc: 3-unit Caltron ship about equivalent to a destroyer. Bloody-minded but can communicate at need. Slavish to orders.

name: Senary
long_desc: 6 Caltron units connected, giving enough computing power to make decisions. Loyal to its programming but occasionally flexible in thinking. About equivalent to a heavy cruiser.

name: Duodenary
long_desc: 12 Caltron units combined. Has similar compute power to the U6 but is combat-focused, equivalent to capital ships, and may launch a number of primary Caltron units.

name: Vigenary-Quaternary
long_desc: 24 Caltron units. A powerful decision-making and strategising unit that is not often seen. It acts as a command node and can control most of the units in a system. It tends to hide but is extremely dangerous if it enters the fray. Do not approach without backup.

name: Quaternary-Octonary
long_desc: 48 Caltron units. This is a regional command node. It is not very manoeuvrable but is tough, smart, and often has unique abilities. Known examples include opening singularity portals for travel to and from, cloaking, and orbital bombardment.

name: EarthLike
long_desc: Earth-like, with atmospheres containing oxygen between 12%-30%. Capable of supporting most life forms to some extent.

name: Gas Giant
long_desc: A gas giant is a huge planet made entirely of base gases. They have dense atmospheres and are generally made of the same materials as stars; however, they lack the mass necessary to begin nuclear fusion.

name: Iron Moon
long_desc: This object is known to be of Caltron or Old Ones manufacture, but little is known about it. Last seen during the Caltron Emergence, it vanished from known space on stardate 41123.

name: ToxicPlanet
long_desc: This planet contains high levels of toxic material and is hostile to life in general.

name: LavaPlanet
long_desc: This planet is still in its infancy with a mostly molten crust; it does, however, have plenty of interesting materials on its surface for those willing to risk the unstable surface.
